Crop Category Id.description: id of the crop category this variety belongs to

Crop Type Id.description: id of the crop type this variety belongs to

Crop Category Name.description: name of the crop category this variety belongs to

Crop Type Name.description: name of the crop type this variety belongs to

Centre.description: research centre that released the crop variety

Year.description: release year of the crop variety (kept as string; source data contains values like 1999/00)

Url.description: detail page url of the crop variety
